note: Discovery only. Ideas + which primary sources to chase. Write original from primary sources; never republish.

leads.title: Inside the Rise of Competitive Fitness Spurred by Hyrox
leads.summary: As fitness-competition phenomenon Hyrox scales globally, a wave of challengers are racing to define what comes next.

leads.title: ATN Insights: 49% of Lapsed Members Say Their Gym Never Reached Out After They Stopped Attending

leads.title: How WeGym® Is Rethinking Strength Training Through a Human-Centered Lens

leads.summary: EoS Fitness is rolling out reformer Pilates at three pilot gyms this summer, with more to follow, the low-price operator said.

leads.summary: Kimba combines adaptive AI, biometric tracking and personalized scent delivery to improve sleep quality without supplements or pharmaceuticals.

leads.title: Your Influencer Contract Doesn’t Say What You Think It Does
